caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" is speaking into a professional microphone. He is positioned in a room with a wall covered in framed photos and a white mannequin wearing a white garment in the background. Clothing racks are visible behind him. On the bottom left of the scene, a logo featuring a circle with a stylized "F" and the text "THE" is visible, and on the bottom right, red text reads "BODYSHELLY TOT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and gesturing with his right hand, which is partially raised. His facial expression shifts slightly as he talks, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
